title: Happy Birthday Daniel
type: AI-generated, Catchphrase, Participatory Media, Pop Culture Reference, Viral Video
about:
Happy Birthday Daniel refers to a viral AI-generated video and series of memes wherein the character Subaru Natsuki from the anime and light novel series Re:Zero Starting Life in Another World aggressively wishes a nebulous "Daniel" a happy birthday, saying, "Happy birthday Daniel! Did you really think I’d let this day pass quietly? I know the kind of power you vibe with, the kind that keeps climbing no matter what!"

The meme, which began spreading on TikTok in the spring of 2026, originated from an unrelated trend where parents create AI-generated videos in which children's favorite characters wish them a happy birthday. The "Daniel" video's spread was further fueled by its association with the Aura Monster / Subaru Walking Up Stairs meme, which trended online around the same timeframe.
origin: The original "Happy Birthday Daniel" video featuring Subaru Natsuki from Re:Zero was posted on March 9th, 2026, by the TikTok[1] page @animeramedia, which uses AI-video generation tools to create personalized video gifts and greetings available for purchase. The video received roughly 3 million views and 246,800 likes in a bit over two months.
